# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This repository hosts an educational website for sharing homework assignments and coding exercises with students.

When assisting with this project, follow these guidelines:

- Focus on learning outcomes and student-friendly language.
- Keep page structure and styling consistent across the site.
- Preserve descriptive file and folder names.
- Use the existing `assignments/`, `templates/`, and `assets/` patterns when adding new content.
- Ensure website content remains easy to browse, view, and download.
- Avoid adding unrelated features or unnecessary complexity.

Project files of interest:

- `index.html`: main portal page
- `config.json`: content configuration for assignments
- `assignments/`: assignment folders and starter code
- `templates/`: reusable content templates
- `assets/`: CSS, JavaScript, images, and other assets
